# Context Loader POC

> Minimal proof-of-concept for the context module loader system.

## App (deployable)
- [app/server.py](app/server.py) — FastAPI web app serving the module picker UI and load endpoint
- [app/templates/index.html](app/templates/index.html) — Module picker HTML template
- [app/Dockerfile](app/Dockerfile) — Container image definition
- [app/docker-compose.yml](app/docker-compose.yml) — Docker Compose config for local deployment

## Modules (shared registry)
- [modules/linear/llms.txt](modules/linear/llms.txt) — Linear integration sample module
- [modules/sqlite/llms.txt](modules/sqlite/llms.txt) — SQLite integration sample module

## Plans
- [plans/01-filebrowser-quantum.md](plans/01-filebrowser-quantum.md) — Plan to add FileBrowser Quantum for visual file management
- [plans/02-claude-code-agent.md](plans/02-claude-code-agent.md) — Plan to auto-start Claude Code inside the container
- [plans/03-varlock-secrets.md](plans/03-varlock-secrets.md) — Plan to add per-module secrets with Varlock
- [plans/04-cli-cmux.md](plans/04-cli-cmux.md) — Plan for a CLI selector with cmux multi-pane layout
